---
title: "Coverage"
author: "Lok Yiu Xuan [23171563]"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(splines)
library(rms)
library(lme4)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(future.apply)
library(data.table)
plan(multisession)
source("../scripts/helpers.R")
```

# Groups
## Type (simul,i,e)
## Method (pool,m)
## Knot (4,5)
## Overlap (no,s,m)

# Construct File Directory
```{r}
methods <- list(pool = "pooled", meta = "meta")
types <- list(simul = "simulate", inter = "interpolate", extra = "extrapolate")
overlaps <- list(no = "no", some = "some", many = "many")
knots <- list(four = "all 4", five = "all 5")

base_t <- "_coverage"
base_o <- "simulated_"
base_dir <- "../data"

all_files <- list()

to_upper <- function(x, pos = 1) {
 paste0(toupper(substr(x, 1, pos)), substr(x, 2, nchar(x)))
}

for (t in types) {
  for (o in overlaps) {
    dir_path <- file.path(base_dir, 
                          paste0(t, base_t), 
                          paste0(base_o, o))
    
    files <- list.files(
      dir_path,
      pattern = "^coverage_.*\\.csv$",
      full.names = TRUE
    )
    
    for (f in files) {
      kk <- stringr::str_extract(basename(f), "(?<=study)\\d")
      list_name <- paste0(t, "_", o, "_", kk)
      all_files[[list_name]] <- list(
        file = f,
        type = to_upper(t),
        overlap = paste0(to_upper(o)),
        knot = paste0("All ", to_upper(kk))
      )
    }
  }
}
```

# Read All Files

```{r}
true_func <- function(x) 10 + 5 * (1 + exp((.15 * (x - 60))))^(-1)
up_list <- function(names) lapply(names, to_upper)
f_lvls <- function(x) unlist(x, use.names = FALSE)

methods  <- up_list(methods)
types    <- up_list(types)
overlaps <- up_list(overlaps)
knots    <- up_list(knots)

cache_file <- paste0("all", base_t, ".dat")

if (file.exists(cache_file)) {
  message("Reading cached coverage data...")
  coverage_all <- readRDS(cache_file)

} else {
  message("Building coverage data (slow)...")

  coverage_all <- future_lapply(all_files, function(info) {
    dt <- data.table::fread(info$file)
    dt[, `:=`(
      method  = to_upper(method),
      type    = info$type,
      overlap = info$overlap,
      knot    = info$knot
    )]
    dt
  })

  coverage_all <- data.table::rbindlist(coverage_all)
  coverage_all[, `:=`(
    method  = factor(method,  levels = f_lvls(methods)),
    type    = factor(type,    levels = f_lvls(types)),
    overlap = factor(overlap, levels = f_lvls(overlaps)),
    knot    = factor(knot,    levels = f_lvls(knots)),
    Study   = factor(Study),
    sim     = factor(sim),
    covered = (true_func(Age) >= lower & true_func(Age) <= upper),
    width   = upper - lower
  )]

  saveRDS(coverage_all, cache_file)
  message("Saved cache to ", cache_file)
}
```

# Helper Functions
```{r}
get_facet_vars <- function(facet_formula) {
  if (is.null(facet_formula)) return(NULL)
  facet_clean <- gsub("\\s+", "", facet_formula)
  sides <- strsplit(facet_clean, "~")[[1]]
  facet_vars <- unlist(strsplit(sides, "\\+"))
  facet_vars <- facet_vars[facet_vars != ""]
  return(facet_vars)
}

nominal_layers <- list(
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95,  linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.6),
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.925, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey65", linewidth = 0.6),
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.975, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey65", linewidth = 0.6)
)

theme_cov <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      strip.background  = element_rect(fill = "grey93", colour = NA),
      strip.text        = element_text(
        face = "bold", 
        size = 9,            # smaller font
        margin = margin(t = 1.5, r = 1, b = 2, l = 1) # reduce padding
      ),
      panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
      legend.position   = "bottom",
      plot.title        = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      plot.subtitle     = element_text(size = 11, colour = "grey40"),
      axis.title        = element_text(size = 10),
      plot.caption      = element_text(size = 9, colour = "grey50")
    )
}

format_p <- function(p, ...) {
  args <- list(...)
  p <- p + theme_cov()
  if (!is.null(args$facet)) p <- p + facet_wrap(as.formula(args$facet))
  if (!is.null(args$title)) p <- p + labs(title = args$title)
  if (!is.null(args$subtitle)) p <- p + labs(subtitle = args$subtitle)
  if (!is.null(args$legend)) p <- p + theme(legend.position = args$legend)
  if (!is.null(args$ylim)) p <- p + ylim(args$ylim)
  if (is.null(args$CI_layer)) p <- p + nominal_layers
  if (!is.null(args$xlim) && isFALSE(args$xlim)) p <- p + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())
  p
}
```

# Plotting Functions

## Boxplots of Coverage by Knot
```{r}
plot_coverage_box <- function(dt, x_var, ...) {
  args <- list(...)
  facet <- args$facet
  
  by_vars <- c("sim", x_var, get_facet_vars(facet))
  sim_cov <- dt[, .(coverage = mean(covered)), by = by_vars]
  
  p <- ggplot(sim_cov, aes(
      x = .data[[x_var]], 
      y = coverage, 
      fill = .data[[x_var]])
    ) + geom_boxplot() +
    coord_flip()
  
  format_p(p, facet = facet, ...)
}

for (c in overlaps) {
  print(plot_coverage_box(
    coverage_all[overlap==c & type!=types$extra],
    x_var = "method", 
    facet = "~knot+type",
    title = c, legend = "bottom"
  ))
}
```

## Coverage vs Age Plots
```{r}
plot_coverage_age <- function(dt, color_var, ...) {
  args <- list(...)
  facet <- args$facet
  
  by_vars <- c("Age", color_var, get_facet_vars(facet))
  age_cov <- dt[, .(coverage = mean(covered)), by = by_vars]
  
  p <- ggplot(age_cov, aes(x = Age, y = coverage, color = .data[[color_var]])) +
    geom_line(size = 1)

  format_p(p, facet = facet, ...)
}

for (c in overlaps) {
  print(plot_coverage_age(
    coverage_all[overlap==c],
    color_var = "method", 
    facet = "~knot+type",
    title = c, legend = "bottom"
  ))
}
```


## Age Distribution
```{r}
age_dt <- coverage_all[overlap==overlaps$no & type==types$inter & knot == knots$four]
by_vars <- c("Age", "method", "knot","type")
age_cov <- age_dt[, .(coverage = mean(covered)), by = by_vars]
age_sub <- age_cov[Age >= 60 & Age <= 70]
min_row <- age_sub[which.min(coverage)]
min_row
```


```{r, message=FALSE}
plot_age_pointwise <- function(dt, age_val, ...) {
  args <- list(...)
  facet <- args$facet

  # Pick the first Age per Study, method, sim, and facet
  by_vars <- c("method", "sim", get_facet_vars(facet))
  # age_dt <- dt[, .SD[which(Age == age_val)], by = by_vars]
  age_dt <- dt[, .SD[which.min(abs(Age - age_val))], by = by_vars]

  # Add true Y at this Age
  age_dt[, Y_true := true_func(Age)]
  actual_age <- age_dt[1, Age]
  # Plot each simulation as a point with CI error bars
  p <- ggplot(age_dt, aes(x = factor(sim), y = Y, color = method)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(color="black", alpha=0.7, shape=3) +
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = Y_true), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
    xlab(paste0("Simulation (n = ",uniqueN(age_dt$sim),")")) +
    labs(subtitle = paste0("Age = ", actual_age))

  format_p(p, ...)
}

age_values <- c(36.54159, 65.53302)
ppp <- lapply(age_values, function(age) {
  lapply(knots, function(k) {
    lapply(overlaps, function(o) {
      plot_age_pointwise(
        coverage_all[overlap==o & knot==k & type != types$extra],
        age_val = age,
        facet = "type~method",
        title = paste0("Plot of ", k, " ", o),
        xlim=F, CI_layer=F
      )
    })
  })
})
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
(ppp[[1]]$four[[1]] + theme(legend.position="none") + 
 ppp[[1]]$four[[2]] + theme(legend.position="none") + 
 ppp[[1]]$four[[3]] + theme(legend.position="none")
) / 
(ppp[[1]]$five[[1]] + theme(legend.position="none") +
 ppp[[1]]$five[[2]] +
 ppp[[1]]$five[[3]] + theme(legend.position="none")
)

(ppp[[2]]$four[[1]] + theme(legend.position="none") + 
 ppp[[2]]$four[[2]] + theme(legend.position="none") + 
 ppp[[2]]$four[[3]] + theme(legend.position="none")
) / 
(ppp[[2]]$five[[1]] + theme(legend.position="none") +
 ppp[[2]]$five[[2]] +
 ppp[[2]]$five[[3]] + theme(legend.position="none")
) 
```

## Coverage by Study
```{r}
plot_coverage_by_study <- function(dt, x_var = "Study",
                                   color_var = "method", ...) {
  args <- list(...)
  facet <- args$facet

  by_vars <- c(x_var, color_var, get_facet_vars(facet))

  smry <-   dt[, .(
    coverage   = mean(covered),
    n          = .N,
    se         = sqrt(mean(covered) * (1 - mean(covered)) / .N),
    mean_width = mean(width)
  ), by = by_vars][, `:=`(
    ci_lo = coverage - 1.96 * se,
    ci_hi = coverage + 1.96 * se
  )]

  
  p <- ggplot(smry, aes(
    x = .data[[x_var]], y = coverage,
    colour = .data[[color_var]],
    shape  = .data[[color_var]]
  )) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi),
                  width = 0.3, position = position_dodge(0.55), 
                  linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_point(size = 2.5, position = position_dodge(0.55))

  format_p(p, facet = facet, ...)
}

for (c in overlaps) {
  print(plot_coverage_by_study(
    coverage_all[overlap==c],
    x_var = "Study",
    color_var = "method", 
    facet = "~knot+type",
    title = c, legend = "bottom"
  ))
}
```

## Coverage Heatmap (All Conditions)

```{r}
plot_heatmap <- function(dt, ...) {
  args <- list(...)
  facet <- args$facet
  
  by_vars <- c("overlap", "type", get_facet_vars(facet))
  smry <- dt[, .(coverage = mean(covered)), by = by_vars]
  
  p <- ggplot(smry, aes(x = type, y = overlap, fill = coverage)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(coverage, accuracy = 0.1)),
              size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient(
      low      = "#d73027",
      high     = "#4575b4",
      limits = c(0.80, 1.00),
      labels   = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
    ) + theme_cov()
  
  format_p(p, ...)
}

print(plot_heatmap(
  coverage_all,
  facet = "~knot+method",
  legend = "bottom", CI_layer=F
))
```

### Difference Heatmap (Meta − Pooled)

```{r}
plot_diff_heatmap <- function(dt, ...) {
  args <- list(...)
  facet <- args$facet
  
  smry <- dt[, .(coverage = mean(covered)),
             by = .(method, type, overlap, knot)]
  
  wide <- dcast(smry, type + overlap + knot ~ method, value.var = "coverage")
  wide[, diff := Meta - Pooled]
  diff_max <- max(abs(wide$diff), na.rm = TRUE)

  p <- ggplot(wide, aes(x = type, y = overlap, fill = diff)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(diff, accuracy = 0.01))) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low      = "#2166ac",
      mid      = "white",
      high     = "#d6604d",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-diff_max, diff_max),
      labels   = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      name     = "\u0394 coverage\n(meta − pooled)"
    ) +
    theme_cov()
  
  # dynamic formatting
  format_p(p, facet = facet, ...)
}

print(plot_diff_heatmap(
  coverage_all,
  facet   = "~knot",
  title   = "Coverage difference heatmap: meta − pooled",
  subtitle = "Red = meta gives higher coverage; blue = pooled is better",
  legend  = "bottom", CI_layer=F
))
```
